groups.title: Install & Lifecycle
groups.summary: Install, remove, and inspect CLI basics.

groups.title: Daemon & Runtime
groups.summary: Run daemon services and single-process scripts.

groups.title: Session Lifecycle
groups.summary: Launch, connect, and manage browser session state.

groups.title: Provider Workflows
groups.summary: Run research, shopping, media, and artifact workflows.

groups.title: Design Canvas
groups.summary: Execute typed /canvas commands for session, document, preview, and code-sync flows.

groups.title: Navigation
groups.summary: Move through pages and capture fresh refs.

groups.title: Interaction
groups.summary: Perform ref-based interactions in the active page.

groups.title: Targets & Pages
groups.summary: Manage tabs, targets, and named pages.

groups.title: DOM & Export
groups.summary: Read DOM state and export page or component code.

groups.title: Diagnostics & Annotation
groups.summary: Collect session-centric diagnostics, trace proof, and annotation payloads.

groups.title: Browser Replay
groups.summary: Capture temporal replay artifacts through the public browser replay lane for a browser target.

groups.title: Desktop Observation
groups.summary: Inspect the public read-only sibling desktop observation plane on macOS; availability, window inventory, and accessibility probes use the local swift command, while screenshots use macOS screencapture outside extension relay.

commands.name: desktop-status
